briefdescription.para: Reseed timeout in micro-seconds.
Generate timeout in micro-seconds.
Word length in bytes.
Byte length in bits.
TRNG block length length in bytes.
Minimum seed life.
Maximum seed life 2^19.
Security strength in 128-bit bursts.
Burst size in words.
Minimum DF input length.
Maximum DF input length.
Number of bytes to be written before wait.
maximum adaptprpptest cutoff value
maximum repcounttest cutoff value
Reset delay.
Delay after 4 bytes.
Delay after 1 byte.
QCNT value for single burst.
Temporal redundancy implementation macro for fault injection protection.
Temporal redundancy check macro with error handling for security-critical operations.

memberdef.argsstring: (XTrngpsx_Instance *InstancePtr, const u8 *Seed, u8 DLen, const u8 *PerStr, const u8 IsBlocking)
memberdef.name: XTrngpsx_ReseedInternal

briefdescription.para: This function triggers and reseeds the DRBG module.

parameterdescription.para: Seed length in multiples of TRNG block size
Blocking or Non-blocking support for reseed operation

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS On successful reseed
XTRNGPSX_ERROR_WRITE On write failure
XTRNGPSX_TIMEOUT_ERROR If timeout occurred waiting for done bit
XTRNGPSX_CATASTROPHIC_CTF_ERROR If CTF bit asserted in STATUS register.
Configure DF Len
Personalization string processing: optional entropy input for DRBG instantiation
Write 384-bit personalization string to TRNG_PER_STRNG registers
Enable personalization string usage: clear PERSODISABLE bit
Configure personalization and initialize PRNG start bit for reseed sequence
DRNG Mode
Enable TST mode and set PRNG mode for reseed operation
Start reseed operation
For writing seed as an input to DF, PRNG start needs to be set
HTRNG Mode
Enable ring oscillators for random seed source
Enable TRSSEN and set PRNG mode for reseed operation
Start reseed operation
Blocking mode handling: optionally wait for reseed completion based on user configuration
State transition and statistics update: mark reseed complete and reset seed life counter
Reset elapsed seed life counter after successful reseed operation
Error state management: update error status unless catastrophic failure already flagged

briefdescription.para: This function writes personalization string in to the registers.

listitem.para: Write 384-bit personalization string to TRNG_PER_STRNG registers
Pack 4 bytes into 32-bit word in big-endian format

briefdescription.para: This function waits for the reseed done bit.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if Random number collection was successful.
XTRNGPSX_TIMEOUT_ERROR if timeout occurred waiting for done bit
XTRNGPSX_CATASTROPHIC_CTF_ERROR if CTF bit asserted in STATUS register.
Wait for TRNG_STATUS.DONE bit with temporal protection
Check for Catastrophic Test Failure (CTF) in status register
Catastrophic error state: mark TRNG as permanently failed until reset/reinitialize
Reset PRNG and TRNG bits for the next operation

briefdescription.para: This function triggers Generate operation and collects random data in buffer.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the buffer in which random data is stored.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if Random number collection was successful.
XTRNGPSX_TIMEOUT_ERROR if timeout occurred waiting for QCNT to become 4.
XTRNGPSX_CATASTROPHIC_DTF_ERROR if DTF bit asserted in STATUS register.
Configure single-generation mode if prediction resistance enabled
Set TRNG in PRNG mode and start random number generation on first random number generation or in single mode generation. Skip for subsequent calls to allow continuous random number generation.
Set PRNG mode to generate
Start random number generation
Mark TRNG as catastrophically failed
Calculate burst index and read 4 words with endian conversion
Clear output buffer on failure to prevent data leakage

briefdescription.para: This function writes seed to the derivative function.

parameterdescription.para: Seed length in multiples of TRNG block size

listitem.para: Seed reconstruction variable for integrity verification
Serial bit input to derivative function via TRNG_CTRL_4 register
Process each bit MSB-first for hardware DF input and integrity verification
Verify entire seed length processed successfully

memberdef.argsstring: (UINTPTR Addr, u32 EventMask, u32 Event, u32 Timeout)
memberdef.name: XTrngpsx_WaitForEvent

briefdescription.para: Waits for an event to occur for a specified duration.

parameterdescription.para: Address of register to be checked for event(s) occurrence.
Mask indicating event(s) to be checked.
Specific event(s) value to be checked.
Max number of microseconds to wait for an event(s).

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS - On occurrence of the event(s). XST_FAILURE - Event did not occur before counter reaches 0.

briefdescription.para: Write to the register.

parameterdescription.para: is the address of the register to be written.
is the value to be written to the register.

briefdescription.para: Read from the register.

simplesect.para: The value read from the register.

briefdescription.para: This function reads, modifies and writes in to the register.

parameterdescription.para: Indicates the bits to be modified
Contains 32 bit Value to be written at the specified address

briefdescription.para: This function brings TRNG core and prng unit out of reset.

listitem.para: Soft reset PRNG unit

briefdescription.para: This function sets TRNG core in to reset state.
This function sets PRNG unit in to reset state.
This function brings PRNG unit out of reset.

listitem.para: Assert PRNG soft reset bit
Deassert PRNG soft reset bit

briefdescription.para: This function configures the DF input length.
This function writes the cutoff value in to the register.

parameterdescription.para: cutoff value for adaptive count test.

briefdescription.para: This function writes the cutoff value in to the register.

parameterdescription.para: cutoff value for repetitive count test.

briefdescription.para: This function writes the DIT value in to the register.
This function initializes the TRNGPSV instance/driver.

detaileddescription.para: This function must be called prior to using the driver. Initialization includes only setting up the device id and base address. All the remaining parameters of the Instance will be initialized in Instantiate function.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XTrngpsx instance.
points to the configuration structure associated with the TRNGPSX driver.
is the base address of the device. If address translation is being used, then this parameter must reflect the virtual base address. Otherwise, the physical address should be used.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if initialization was successful.
XTRNGPSX_INVALID_PARAM if invalid parameter passed to this function.
Validate input parameters.
Populate Config parameters

memberdef.argsstring: (XTrngpsx_Instance *InstancePtr, const u8 *Seed, u32 SeedLength, const u8 *PersStr, const XTrngpsx_UserConfig *UserCfg)
memberdef.name: XTrngpsx_Instantiate

briefdescription.para: This function instantiates the TRNG instance with user configure values.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the personalization string input

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS On successful instantiation
XTRNGPSX_INVALID_PARAM If invalid parameter(s) passed to this function.
XTRNGPSX_INVALID_SEED_VALUE If provide seed is NULL in DRBG mode
XTRNGPSX_INVALID_STATE If state is not in uninstantiate state
XTRNGPSX_UNHEALTHY_STATE If TRNG KAT fails
XTRNGPSX_INVALID_MODE If invalid mode is passed to this function
XTRNGPSX_INVALID_DF_LENGTH If invalid DF input length is passed as a function
XTRNGPSX_INVALID_SEED_LENGTH If provide seed length doesn't match with given DF length
XTRNGPSX_INVALID_SEED_LIFE If invalid seed life is provided
XTRNGPSX_INVALID_ADAPTPROPTEST_CUTOFF_VALUE If invalid cutoff value is provided
XTRNGPSX_INVALID_REPCOUNTTEST_CUTOFF_VALUE If invalid repetitive test cutoff value is provided
XTRNGPSX_USER_CFG_COPY_ERROR If error occurred during copy of XTrngpsx_UserConfig structure
XTRNGPSX_TIMEOUT_ERROR If timeout occurred waiting for done bit
XTRNGPSX_CATASTROPHIC_CTF_ERROR If CTF bit asserted in STATUS register.
XTRNGPSX_ERROR_WRITE On write failure
XTRNGPSX_INVALID_BLOCKING_MODE If invalid blocking mode is chosen
XST_FAILURE On unexpected failure
Validate input arguments
Secure copy user configuration to driver instance
Bring TRNG and PRNG unit core out of reset
Configure health monitoring and DIT for PTRNG/HRNG
Configure cutoff values
Configure default DIT value
Do reseed operation when mode is DRNG/HRNG
Mark TRNG as healthy and ready for operation
Set error state on failure (except catastrophic failures)

briefdescription.para: This function triggers and reseeds the DRBG module.

parameterdescription.para: Seed length in TRNG block size

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS On successful reseed
XTRNGPSX_INVALID_PARAM If invalid parameter(s) passed to this function.
XTRNGPSX_INVALID_SEED_VALUE If provide seed is NULL in DRBG/HRNG mode
XTRNGPSX_INVALID_MODE If invalid mode is passed to this function
XTRNGPSX_INVALID_DF_LENGTH If invalid DF input length is passed as a function
XTRNGPSX_INVALID_STATE If state is not sequenced correctly
XTRNGPSX_UNHEALTHY_STATE If TRNG is in failure state, needs an uninstantiation or KAT should be run if the error is catastrophic
XTRNGPSX_TIMEOUT_ERROR If timeout occurred waiting for done bit
XTRNGPSX_CATASTROPHIC_CTF_ERROR If CTF bit asserted in STATUS register.
XTRNGPSX_ERROR_WRITE On write failure
XST_FAILURE On unexpected failure
Validate input arguments.
Wait for reseed operation and check CTF flag
Execute reseed operation with temporal protection against fault attacks

briefdescription.para: This function generates and collects random data in to a buffer.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to buffer in which random data is stored.
Size of the buffer in which random data is stored.
is the flag that controls Generate level Prediction Resistance. When enabled, it mandates fresh seed for every Generate operation.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS On successful generate of random number
XTRNGPSX_INVALID_PARAM If invalid parameter(s) passed to this function.
XTRNGPSX_INVALID_STATE If state is not sequenced correctly
XTRNGPSX_INVALID_MODE If invalid mode is passed to this function
XTRNGPSX_INVALID_BUF_SIZE If buffer is less that 256 bytes or NULL
XTRNGPSX_INVALID_PREDRES_VALUE If invalid predication resistance value is passed to this function
XTRNGPSX_UNHEALTHY_STATE If TRNG is in failure state, needs an uninstantiation or KAT should be run if error is catastrophic
XTRNGPSX_RESEED_REQUIRED_ERROR If elapsed seed life exceeds the requested seed life in DRBG mode
XTRNGPSX_TIMEOUT_ERROR If timeout occurred waiting for QCNT to become 4.
XTRNGPSX_CATASTROPHIC_DTF_ERROR If DTF bit asserted in STATUS register.
XTRNGPSX_ERROR_WRITE On write failure
XST_FAILURE On unexpected failure
Validate input arguments.
Wait for reseed operation and check CTF flag
Store prediction resistance setting for hardware configuration during data collection
Enable ring oscillators for random seed source
Configure TRNG control: enable TRSS, EU mode for PTRNG operation
Trigger generate and collect random data
State machine update: transition to generate state indicating successful operation
Update seed life and handle HRNG automatic reseed logic
HRNG automatic reseed logic: maintain fresh entropy based on configured seed life
Auto reseed in HRNG mode
Automatic reseed with internal entropy: maintain cryptographic strength
Update error state on failure (preserve catastrophic state)

briefdescription.para: This function uninstantiates the TRNG instance.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if uninstantiation was successful.
XTRNGPSX_INVALID_PARAM if invalid instance is passed to function
XTRNGPSX_ERROR_MEMSET_UNINSTANTIATE_ERROR if memset was not successful
XST_FAILURE On unexpected failure
Bring cores in to reset state
Disable ring oscillators as a random seed source
Retain the error state
